phases.name: Pre-flight + branch + canon survey
phases.outcome: git pull main HEAD 5ec1580 clean; branch feat/LANE01-BRIDGE-01-bloch-schema-spec created; canon survey performed (see canon_survey_results above)

phases.name: Author BLOCH spec doc
phases.outcome: docs/architecture/BLOCH_SCHEMA_SPEC_v1.md ~13KB — 13 numbered sections + changelog. 12 fields with type + mandatory + mutability + meaning. V1-V9 verify rules with failure modes. encryption_protocol enum (classical_sha256 ACTIVE; ed25519/dilithium/falcon reserved). JSON canonical form spec for deterministic signing. Naming conventions. Knowledge category contract. 2 worked BLOCH examples (AIER Code governance + AIER Ops deploy) with mental V1-V9 verify trace. Cross-reference table mapping spec sections to Canon V1.1 sections + repo-backed sources.

phases.name: Self-verify 2 examples mentally pass V1-V9
phases.outcome: Both examples pass V1-V9 (V1 fields complete, V2 identifier shape, V3 identity binding (assumed), V4 timestamp sanity, V5 lineage genesis, V6 signature placeholder structure, V7 confidence range, V8 Knowledge category contract, V9 qot_chain step 1 actor=source_aier_id). Example UDNA hashes are clearly-marked synthetic SHA256 of labeled placeholder strings — not real identity values.
